case_title: BALQUEDRA, CAROL vs. NGUYEN, MINH VAN et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 206, MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2002, GRANTED ORDER SIGNED TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2002 AT 09:00 AM

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION IN LIMINE FILED DEFENDANTS' MOTION IN LIMINE FILED THIS CAUSE IS CONTINUED FROM JULY 15,2002. A PANEL OF 45 PROSPECTIVE JURORS ARE SWORN ON VOIR DIRE. EIGHT JURORS AND TWO ALTERNATES ARE SWWORN TO TRY THE CAUSE. OPENING STATEMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. DIRECT EXAMINATION. CROSS EXAMINATION. REDIRECT. PLAINTIFF RESTS. PER DIEM FEES OF $270.00 IS DUE BY BOTH SIDES. COURT ADJOURNS MATTER UNTIL JULY 17, 2002 AT 9:00AM.

THIS CAUSE IS CONTINUED FROM JULY 16, 2002. ELAINE ROA SERINA DESIGNATED AS AN EXPERT WITNESS, S/E ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. CROSS EXAMINATION. REDIRECT EXAM. DEFENSE RESTS. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED FOR TRIAL DE NOVO BY JURY - (DE NOVO REQUEST) IF OBJECTION: HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-18-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THIS CAUSE IS ASSIGNED FROM DEPT. 206 TO DEPT. 220 FOR JURY TRIAL. STEPHEN J. GORSKI APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF. MICHAEL J. SMITH APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS. THE COUNSEL FOR THE PARTIES WILL SUBMIT THEIR RESPECTIVE STATEMENT OF THE CASE BY JULY 16, 2002 AT 9:30AM. THE COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS STIPULATE AS TO THE PLTFF'S MOTION IN LIMINE TO EXCLUDE EXPERT TESTIMONY,TO LIMIT IT AS TO CAUSATION ONLY. THE DEFENDANTS' MOTIONS IN LIMINE ARE SUBMITTED, ARGUED, AND RULED UPON AS FULLY REFLECTED IN THE COURT REPORTER'S RECORD BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE AS TO THE USE OF EIGHT JURORS ONLY. A $90.00 PER DIEM FEE IS DUE BY BOTH SIDES. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED UNTIL JULY 16, 2002 AT 9:30 AM.
